description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a full-length barrel and a prominent vented rib along the top. The stock is a synthetic full stock with an integrated pistol grip for enhanced control, and there are visible shell holders embedded in the stock for quick reloading. The fore-end is equipped with a vertical foregrip, suggesting improved handling during rapid fire or tactical use. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, likely steel, with polymer components for the stock and grip. The shotgun has a rail system on top for mounting optics or accessories, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A tactical black shotgun with a full stock, pistol grip, vertical foregrip, and accessory rail, designed for robust urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full stock with shell holders, pistol grip, and vertical foregrip clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's circular opening and the alignment of the vertical foregrip beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the barrel, stock, and grip, with less detail on the shell holders.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and foregrip from behind.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented rib along the top
attribute_stock_type: full stock with integrated pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with robust construction
